notes: Added write_poly_data_texture(queue, texture, &[PolyDynData]) plus data_texture_copy_layout and DATA_TEXTURE_BYTES_PER_ROW. Helper packs and uploads via queue.write_texture using the 2-texels/polygon layout. Wired an initial default upload in load_level_into. Tests: copy_layout_bytes_per_row_matches_packed_buffer and round_trip_through_texel_byte_layout_yields_input (pack -> bytes -> f32 -> unpack reproduces input) pass; all 8 poly_data tests green; wasm32 cargo check green.
